root_text.an5.24:1.2: sammāsamādhimhi asati sammāsamādhivipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ;
root_text.an5.24:1.3: yathābhūtañāṇadassane asati yathābhūtañāṇadassanavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti nibbidāvirāgo;
root_text.an5.24:1.4: nibbidāvirāge asati nibbidāvirāgavipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an5.24:1.6: Tassa papaṭikāpi na pāripūriṁ gacchati, tacopi na pāripūriṁ gacchati, pheggupi na pāripūriṁ gacchati, sāropi na pāripūriṁ gacchati;
root_text.an5.24:1.7: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dussīlassa sīlavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti sammāsamādhi;
root_text.an5.24:1.8: sammāsamādhimhi asati sammāsamādhivipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ;
root_text.an5.24:1.9: yathābhūtañāṇadassane asati yathābhūtañāṇadassanavipannassa hatūpaniso hoti nibbidāvirāgo;
root_text.an5.24:1.10: nibbidāvirāge asati nibbidāvirāgavipannassa hatūpanisaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an5.24:2.1: Sīlavato, bhikkhave, sīlasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti sammāsamādhi;
root_text.an5.24:2.2: sammāsamādhimhi sati sammāsamādhisampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ;
root_text.an5.24:2.3: yathābhūtañāṇadassane sati yathābhūtañāṇadassanasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti nibbidāvirāgo;
root_text.an5.24:2.4: nibbidāvirāge sati nibbidāvirāgasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanaṁ.
root_text.an5.24:2.5: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, rukkho sākhāpalāsasampanno. Tassa papaṭikāpi pāripūriṁ gacchati, tacopi pāripūriṁ gacchati, pheggupi pāripūriṁ gacchati, sāropi pāripūriṁ gacchati;
root_text.an5.24:2.6: evamevaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sīlavato sīlasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti sammāsamādhi;
root_text.an5.24:2.7: sammāsamādhimhi sati sammāsamādhisampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti yathābhūtañāṇadassanaṁ;
root_text.an5.24:2.8: yathābhūtañāṇadassane sati yathābhūtañāṇadassanasampannassa upanisasampanno hoti nibbidāvirāgo;
root_text.an5.24:2.9: nibbidāvirāge sati nibbidāvirāgasampannassa upanisasampannaṁ hoti vimuttiñāṇadassanan”ti.

translation_text.an5.24:1.1: “Mendicants, an unethical person, who lacks ethics, has destroyed a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an5.24:1.2: When there is no right immersion, one who lacks right immersion has destroyed a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an5.24:1.3: When there is no true knowledge and vision, one who lacks true knowledge and vision has destroyed a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an5.24:1.4: When there is no disillusionment and dispassion, one who lacks disillusionment and dispassion has destroyed a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an5.24:1.5: Suppose there was a tree that lacked branches and foliage.
translation_text.an5.24:1.6: Its shoots, bark, softwood, and heartwood would not grow to fullness.
translation_text.an5.24:1.7: In the same way, an unethical person, who lacks ethics, has destroyed a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an5.24:1.8: When there is no right immersion, one who lacks right immersion has destroyed a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an5.24:1.9: When there is no true knowledge and vision, one who lacks true knowledge and vision has destroyed a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an5.24:1.10: When there is no disillusionment and dispassion, one who lacks disillusionment and dispassion has destroyed a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an5.24:2.1: An ethical person, who has fulfilled ethics, has fulfilled a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an5.24:2.2: When there is right immersion, one who has fulfilled right immersion has fulfilled a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an5.24:2.3: When there is true knowledge and vision, one who has fulfilled true knowledge and vision has fulfilled a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an5.24:2.4: When there is disillusionment and dispassion, one who has fulfilled disillusionment and dispassion has fulfilled a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.
translation_text.an5.24:2.5: Suppose there was a tree that was complete with branches and foliage. Its shoots, bark, softwood, and heartwood would all grow to fullness.
translation_text.an5.24:2.6: In the same way, an ethical person, who has fulfilled ethics, has fulfilled a vital condition for right immersion.
translation_text.an5.24:2.7: When there is right immersion, one who has fulfilled right immersion has fulfilled a vital condition for true knowledge and vision.
translation_text.an5.24:2.8: When there is true knowledge and vision, one who has fulfilled true knowledge and vision has fulfilled a vital condition for disillusionment and dispassion.
translation_text.an5.24:2.9: When there is disillusionment and dispassion, one who has fulfilled disillusionment and dispassion has fulfilled a vital condition for knowledge and vision of freedom.”

reference_text.an5.24:1.1: csp1ed16.17, csp2ed16.17, dr22.21, ms16A5_89, msdiv24, ndp17.289, pts-vp-pli3.20, vri37.18
